reviews.review_description:
I paint real miniatures and thought this might be interesting to try, while some techniques are not easily done with a little bit of fidgeting you can make them work. The miniatures while on the cartoonish side paint up nicely. The ability to enlarge the models to get into tight areas and be a little more precise is very nice and works very well. Your overall work space set up is pretty customizable as far as left, right, front, high, low however you want to place it. And the one major thing that really sells this for somebody who enjoys painting and likes to practice, is your cat's not going to knock your paint off or your paint water over. 
The good thing is in future updates they plan to have game rules that allow you to play with your painted miniatures, bring a more personal feel to the game I'm sure.
Small learning curve but nothing that can't be handled.
After you get all the miniatures painted your confidence should be built and you'll be wanting more miniatures to paint. ;-) nod nod Dev's LOL
